# lunar

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/lunar"
```

Package lunar provides lunar phase calculation and eclipse detection.

CalcLunarPhase returns the current Moon phase, illumination, and Sun\-Moon angle for a given Julian Day. FindLunarPhases scans a date range for New Moons, Full Moons, and quarter phases. FindEclipses detects solar and lunar eclipses with type classification \(partial, total, annular\). NextNewMoon and NextFullMoon find the next occurrence of each phase.

<a name="EclipseInfo"></a>
## type [EclipseInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lunar/lunar.go#L63-L72>)

EclipseInfo holds eclipse data

```go
type EclipseInfo struct {
    Type     EclipseType `json:"type"`
    JD       float64     `json:"jd"`
    MoonLon  float64     `json:"moon_longitude"`
    MoonSign string      `json:"moon_sign"`
    SunLon   float64     `json:"sun_longitude"`
    SunSign  string      `json:"sun_sign"`
    MoonLat  float64     `json:"moon_latitude"`
    Gamma    float64     `json:"gamma,omitempty"` // approximate eclipse magnitude indicator
}
```

<a name="FindEclipses"></a>
### func [FindEclipses](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lunar/lunar.go#L165>)

```go
func FindEclipses(startJD, endJD float64) ([]EclipseInfo, error)
```

FindEclipses finds solar and lunar eclipses in a date range. Solar eclipses occur at new moons when Moon is near the nodes. Lunar eclipses occur at full moons when Moon is near the nodes.

<a name="EclipseType"></a>
## type [EclipseType](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lunar/lunar.go#L51>)

EclipseType represents the type of eclipse

```go
type EclipseType string
```

<a name="EclipseSolarTotal"></a>

```go
const (
    EclipseSolarTotal     EclipseType = "SOLAR_TOTAL"
    EclipseSolarAnnular   EclipseType = "SOLAR_ANNULAR"
    EclipseSolarPartial   EclipseType = "SOLAR_PARTIAL"
    EclipseLunarTotal     EclipseType = "LUNAR_TOTAL"
    EclipseLunarPartial   EclipseType = "LUNAR_PARTIAL"
    EclipseLunarPenumbral EclipseType = "LUNAR_PENUMBRAL"
)
```

<a name="LunarEvent"></a>
## type [LunarEvent](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lunar/lunar.go#L41-L48>)

LunarEvent represents a major lunar phase event \(new/full/quarter\)

```go
type LunarEvent struct {
    Phase    Phase   `json:"phase"`
    JD       float64 `json:"jd"`
    MoonLon  float64 `json:"moon_longitude"`
    MoonSign string  `json:"moon_sign"`
    SunLon   float64 `json:"sun_longitude"`
    SunSign  string  `json:"sun_sign"`
}
```

```go
func FindLunarPhases(startJD, endJD float64) ([]LunarEvent, error)
```

FindLunarPhases finds all major lunar phase events in a date range

<a name="Phase"></a>
## type [Phase](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lunar/lunar.go#L16>)

Phase represents a lunar phase

```go
type Phase string
```

<a name="PhaseNewMoon"></a>

```go
const (
    PhaseNewMoon        Phase = "NEW_MOON"
    PhaseWaxingCrescent Phase = "WAXING_CRESCENT"
    PhaseFirstQuarter   Phase = "FIRST_QUARTER"
    PhaseWaxingGibbous  Phase = "WAXING_GIBBOUS"
    PhaseFullMoon       Phase = "FULL_MOON"
    PhaseWaningGibbous  Phase = "WANING_GIBBOUS"
    PhaseLastQuarter    Phase = "LAST_QUARTER"
    PhaseWaningCrescent Phase = "WANING_CRESCENT"
)
```

<a name="PhaseInfo"></a>
## type [PhaseInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/lunar/lunar.go#L30-L38>)

PhaseInfo holds lunar phase data at a specific time

```go
type PhaseInfo struct {
    Phase        Phase   `json:"phase"`
    PhaseName    string  `json:"phase_name"`
    PhaseAngle   float64 `json:"phase_angle"`  // Sun-Moon elongation (0-360)
    Illumination float64 `json:"illumination"` // 0.0 - 1.0
    MoonLon      float64 `json:"moon_longitude"`
    SunLon       float64 `json:"sun_longitude"`
    IsWaxing     bool    `json:"is_waxing"`
}
```
